title: Projects
description: Projects are backed by Kubernetes Namespaces in the current cluster.

create.title: Create project
create.description: A Kubernetes Namespace will be created immediately.

detail.title: Project
detail.description: Editing saves directly to the backing Namespace.

volumes.title: Volumes
volumes.description: Volumes are Kubernetes PersistentVolumeClaims in this project's namespace.

create.title: Create volume
create.description: Saving creates a PersistentVolumeClaim in the project namespace.

delete.title: Delete volume
delete.description: Delete volume "{{name}}"? The backing PersistentVolumeClaim will be removed.

registry_credentials.title: Registry credentials
registry_credentials.description: Registry credentials are Kubernetes image pull Secrets in this project's namespace.

create.title: Create registry credential
create.description: Saving creates a Kubernetes Secret for pulling private images.

edit.title: Edit registry credential
edit.description: Update the backing Secret without changing its Kubernetes name.

password.label: Password or token
password.edit_placeholder: Leave blank to keep current token
password.description: Leave blank to keep the current password or token.

delete.title: Delete registry credential
delete.description: Delete registry credential "{{name}}"? Services using it may fail to pull private images.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage the project name and deletion.

update.title: Project information
update.description: Saving updates the backing Namespace directly.

danger_zone.title: Danger zone
danger_zone.description: Deleting the project may let the controller clean up related Kubernetes resources.

delete.title: Delete project
delete.description: Delete project "{{name}}"? Its Kubernetes resources may be removed by the controller.
